title: Miracle
lyrics: What are you waiting for? Hey, what are you waiting for? A miracle to come and save you A miracle to make you brave Are you convinced Jesus is actually A whole entire disaster of this mindset of hell? If you don't have your health You don't have any hope What do you say? You can be what you really wanna be Well, I wait for a miracle One for you to see your own face Yeah, a miracle So we can see the semblance of this disaster A miracle, a miracle And you would be here And I just don't blame what you see And what you can't do You think you're better than the whole view Miracles come and take you up Not bring you down Miracles, they come to bring you up And not break you down I'm waiting for you to see that You're just fucking my own mind up Me up, so I should probably leave that But it's more like I'm waiting for A miracle I'm waiting for ways that you can see me Past the desires of the foundational thing that you hate Don't need any more waiting room I don't need you to come and rescue me Cause miracles are lost And we should be better than this But you choose to just hate the whole feeling of your life Next to your choices So I'll be going down the road Showing my love to other folks Want to appreciate this and don't hate I never took anything from you I never made you feel all that you have And if you forget it when you're angry Then you should probably get that looked at A miracle Would be for you To see the things that you've done to me And your own fucked up view Yeah, a miracle For you to see that So you just stay obliterated in your mind With perforated cutouts that you think is divine There's no reason you can judge and tell anybody that There's no reason you should just be mean to be mean Cause you don't feel good, it's not just about you It's about us together What do you think about miracles? And it still comes to you Because all this you and all the hate that you throw out Yeah You can never be okay with just being wrong You gotta stand up and justify And say you didn't do anything wrong But your partner's just different than you And you should probably change if you wanna keep him, boo But probably not a miracle To be gone with this life Fuck this shit If it even was a lie It's kinda disgusting at the end of the night, you know? Shit Unincorporated hate Bitch

lyricsSegments.text: What are you waiting for?
Hey, what are you waiting for?
A miracle to come and save you
A miracle to make you brave
Are you convinced Jesus is actually
A whole entire disaster of this mindset of hell?
If you don't have your health
You don't have any hope
What do you say?
You can be what you really wanna be
Well, I wait for a miracle
One for you to see your own face
Yeah, a miracle
So we can see the semblance of this disaster
A miracle, a miracle
And you would be here
And I just don't blame what you see
And what you can't do
You think you're better than the whole view
Miracles come and take you up
Not bring you down
Miracles, they come to bring you up
And not break you down
I'm waiting for you to see that
You're just fucking my own mind up
Me up, so I should probably leave that
But it's more like I'm waiting for
A miracle
I'm waiting for ways that you can see me
Past the desires of the foundational thing that you hate
Don't need any more waiting room
I don't need you to come and rescue me
Cause miracles are lost
And we should be better than this
But you choose to just hate the whole feeling of your life
Next to your choices
So I'll be going down the road
Showing my love to other folks
Want to appreciate this and don't hate
I never took anything from you
I never made you feel all that you have
And if you forget it when you're angry
Then you should probably get that looked at
A miracle
Would be for you
To see the things that you've done to me
And your own fucked up view
Yeah, a miracle
For you to see that
So you just stay obliterated in your mind
With perforated cutouts that you think is divine
There's no reason you can judge and tell anybody that
There's no reason you should just be mean to be mean
Cause you don't feel good, it's not just about you
It's about us together
What do you think about miracles?
And it still comes to you
Because all this you and all the hate that you throw out
Yeah
You can never be okay with just being wrong
You gotta stand up and justify
And say you didn't do anything wrong
But your partner's just different than you
And you should probably change if you wanna keep him, boo
But probably not a miracle
To be gone with this life
Fuck this shit
If it even was a lie
It's kinda disgusting at the end of the night, you know?
Shit
Unincorporated hate
Bitch
